Urgency $\rightarrow$ Climax (Accident) $\rightarrow$ Relief/Reflection.
Group approaching the base of The far wall with urgency.
Group positioned outside dainty_china_country looking back at the landscape.
Scaling the wall and accidental destruction of a porcelain structure.
